sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_urls (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, url CLOB NOT NULL);
SELECT sys.getquery(url) AS query_part, timestamp(6) '2023-01-01 00:00:00.123456' AS event_time FROM test_urls;
SELECT sys.getquery(url) AS query_part, timestamp(6) '2023-12-31 23:59:59.999999' AS event_time FROM test_urls WHERE url IS NOT NULL;
SELECT timestamp(6) '2020-09-28 18:40:05.123456' AS event_time, sys.getquery((SELECT url FROM test_urls WHERE id = 1)) AS query_part;
SELECT url, COUNT(*) FROM test_urls GROUP BY sys.getquery(url) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT url, timestamp(6) '2023-01-01 00:00:00.000000' FROM test_urls WHERE LENGTH(sys.getquery(url)) > 10 ORDER BY event_time DESC;
CREATE TABLE test_data (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, data_value INT CHECK(data_value >= 0) DEFAULT 0);
SELECT d.id, d.data_value, sys.getquery((SELECT url FROM test_urls WHERE id = 1)) AS query_part FROM test_data d JOIN test_urls t ON sys.getquery(t.url) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sys.getquery(url) AS unique_queries FROM test_urls) AS temp WHERE unique_queries IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE test_temp AS SELECT url, timestamp(6) '2020-01-01 00:00:01.234567' AS temp_time FROM test_urls WHERE url LIKE 'http%';
